hero.subtitle: Software development. Quality, user experience, and delivery timelines.

status.nowDesc: Creating scalable web platforms and high-performance management systems. Transforming complex designs into fluid interfaces using React, Zustand, and TypeScript, with a strong focus on real-time data optimization and self-managing digital architectures.
status.radarDesc: Exploring meta-orchestration procedures for task decomposition, scheduling, and prioritization in autonomous development systems.
status.interestsDesc: From design systems to distributed architectures — constantly pushing boundaries and exploring new paradigms in software engineering.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: A passionate software developer with a love for clean code, thoughtful design, and solving complex problems.

2024.description: I develop a community management platform with React, Zustand and Material UI, prioritizing design fidelity, Zod validation and multi-language scalability.

2022.description: Built scalable web platforms from the ground up, handling everything from database design to pixel-perfect UIs.
